content:
{
  "dialogues": [
    {
      "title": "頭痛",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "你怎麼了？看起來不太舒服。",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ zěnme le? Kàn qǐlái bú tài shūfu.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 zen3me le5? Kan4 qi3lai2 bu2 tai4 shu1fu.",
          "translation_en": "What's wrong? You don't look well.",
          "translation_ko": "어디 아파요? 몸이 안 좋아 보여요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "我從早上開始一直頭痛，到現在還沒有好。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ cóng zǎoshang kāishǐ yìzhí tóutòng, dào xiànzài hái méiyǒu hǎo.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 cong2 zao3shang kai1shi3 yi4zhi2 tou2tong4, dao4 xian4zai4 hai2 mei2you3 hao3.",
          "translation_en": "I've had a headache since this morning, and it still hasn't gotten better.",
          "translation_ko": "아침부터 계속 두통이 있는데, 아직도 낫지 않았어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "有去看醫生嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Yǒu qù kàn yīshēng ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "You3 qu4 kan4 yi1sheng1 ma?",
          "translation_en": "Have you seen a doctor?",
          "translation_ko": "병원에 가 보셨어요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "還沒有。我想先休息一下，如果還是很痛，再去看醫生。",
          "pinyin": "Hái méiyǒu. Wǒ xiǎng xiān xiūxi yíxià, rúguǒ háishì hěn tòng, zài qù kàn yīshēng.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hai2 mei2you3. Wo3 xiang3 xian1 xiu1xi yi2xia4, ru2guo3 hai2shi4 hen3 tong4, zai4 qu4 kan4 yi1sheng1.",
          "translation_en": "Not yet. I want to rest first. If it still hurts a lot, then I'll go see a doctor.",
          "translation_ko": "아직요. 먼저 좀 쉬려고요. 그래도 계속 아프면 병원에 갈 거예요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "要不要吃一點藥？我這裡有頭痛藥。",
          "pinyin": "Yào bú yào chī yìdiǎn yào? Wǒ zhèlǐ yǒu tóutòng yào.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Yao4 bu2 yao4 chi1 yi4dian3 yao4? Wo3 zhe4li3 you3 tou2tong4 yao4.",
          "translation_en": "Do you want to take some medicine? I have headache medicine here.",
          "translation_ko": "약 좀 드실래요? 여기 두통약 있어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "不用了，謝謝。我休息一下就好。",
          "pinyin": "Bú yòng le, xièxie. Wǒ xiūxi yíxià jiù hǎo.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Bu2 yong4 le5, xie4xie5. Wo3 xiu1xi yi2xia4 jiu4 hao3.",
          "translation_en": "No, thank you. I'll be fine after resting a bit.",
          "translation_ko": "괜찮아요, 고마워요. 좀 쉬면 괜찮아질 거예요."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "When did B's headache start?",
          "question_ko": "B의 두통은 언제부터 시작되었습니까?",
          "options_en": ["This morning", "Yesterday", "Last week"],
          "options_ko": ["오늘 아침", "어제", "지난주"],
          "correct_index": 0
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on the tone of 'tóutòng' and the phrase 'cóng...kāishǐ'.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Describe a time you had a headache. What did you do? Did you see a doctor or take medicine?"
    },
    {
      "title": "肚子痛",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "你怎麼一直摸肚子？不舒服嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ zěnme yìzhí mō dùzi? Bù shūfu ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 zen3me yi4zhi2 mo1 du4zi5? Bu4 shu1fu ma?",
          "translation_en": "Why are you holding your stomach? Are you feeling unwell?",
          "translation_ko": "왜 계속 배를 만지고 있어요? 몸이 안 좋아요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "對，我肚子痛，從昨天晚上到現在一直拉肚子。",
          "pinyin": "Duì, wǒ dùzi tòng, cóng zuótiān wǎnshang dào xiànzài yìzhí lā dùzi.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Dui4, wo3 du4zi5 tong4, cong2 zuo2tian1 wan3shang dao4 xian4zai4 yi4zhi2 la1 du4zi5.",
          "translation_en": "Yes, I have a stomachache. I've had diarrhea since last night.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 배가 아파요. 어젯밤부터 지금까지 계속 설사를 해요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "有沒有發燒？",
          "pinyin": "Yǒu méiyǒu fāshāo?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "You3 mei2you3 fa1shao1?",
          "translation_en": "Do you have a fever?",
          "translation_ko": "열은 있어요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "沒有發燒，但是肚子越來越痛，有點受不了。",
          "pinyin": "Méiyǒu fāshāo, dànshì dùzi yuè lái yuè tòng, yǒudiǎn shòu bù liǎo.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Mei2you3 fa1shao1, dan4shi4 du4zi5 yue4 lai2 yue4 tong4, you3dian3 shou4 bu4 liao3.",
          "translation_en": "No fever, but my stomach hurts more and more. I can't stand it.",
          "translation_ko": "열은 없는데 배가 점점 더 아파요. 좀 참기 힘들어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "那要趕快去看醫生！我陪你去醫院掛號。",
          "pinyin": "Nà yào gǎnkuài qù kàn yīshēng! Wǒ péi nǐ qù yīyuàn guàhào.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Na4 yao4 gan3kuai4 qu4 kan4 yi1sheng1! Wo3 pei2 ni3 qu4 yi1yuan4 gua4hao4.",
          "translation_en": "Then you should see a doctor quickly! I'll go with you to register at the hospital.",
          "translation_ko": "그럼 빨리 병원에 가 봐야 해요! 제가 같이 가서 접수해 드릴게요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "好，麻煩你了。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo, máfan nǐ le.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3, ma2fan5 ni3 le5.",
          "translation_en": "Okay, thank you for your trouble.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 번거롭게 해드려서 죄송해요."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What symptom does B have besides stomach pain?",
          "question_ko": "B는 복통 외에 어떤 증상이 있습니까?",
          "options_en": ["Fever", "Diarrhea", "Cough"],
          "options_ko": ["발열", "설사", "기침"],
          "correct_index": 1
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence, paying attention to 'lā dùzi' and 'yuè lái yuè tòng'.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Have you ever had a stomachache? What caused it? What did you do to feel better?"
    },
    {
      "title": "感冒症狀",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "你聽起來聲音怪怪的，是不是感冒了？",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ tīng qǐlái shēngyīn guài guài de, shì bú shì gǎnmào le?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 ting1 qi3lai2 sheng1yin1 guai4 guai4 de5, shi4 bu2 shi4 gan3mao4 le5?",
          "translation_en": "Your voice sounds strange. Did you catch a cold?",
          "translation_ko": "목소리가 이상한데, 감기 걸렸어요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "對，我昨天開始喉嚨痛，今天早上起來一直咳嗽，還有流鼻水。",
          "pinyin": "Duì, wǒ zuótiān kāishǐ hóulóng tòng, jīntiān zǎoshang qǐlai yìzhí késòu, hái yǒu liú bíshuǐ.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Dui4, wo3 zuo2tian1 kai1shi3 hou2long2 tong4, jin1tian1 zao3shang qi3lai5 yi4zhi2 ke2sou4, hai2 you3 liu2 bi2shui3.",
          "translation_en": "Yes, my throat started hurting yesterday. This morning I've been coughing and have a runny nose.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 어제부터 목이 아팠는데, 오늘 아침에 일어나서 계속 기침하고 콧물도 나요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "有沒有量體溫？發燒了嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Yǒu méiyǒu liáng tǐwēn? Fāshāo le ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "You3 mei2you3 liang2 ti3wen1? Fa1shao1 le5 ma?",
          "translation_en": "Did you take your temperature? Do you have a fever?",
          "translation_ko": "체온은 재봤어요? 열이 있어요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "量了，三十七度五，有一點點發燒，但是不嚴重。",
          "pinyin": "Liáng le, sānshíqī dù wǔ, yǒu yìdiǎndiǎn fāshāo, dànshì bù yánzhòng.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Liang2 le5, san1shi2qi1 du4 wu3, you3 yi4dian3dian3 fa1shao1, dan4shi4 bu4 yan2zhong4.",
          "translation_en": "I did. It's 37.5 degrees. I have a slight fever, but it's not serious.",
          "translation_ko": "재봤는데 37.5도예요. 열이 조금 있지만 심하지는 않아요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "要多休息，喝熱水，吃藥了嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Yào duō xiūxi, hē rè shuǐ, chī yào le ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Yao4 duo1 xiu1xi, he1 re4 shui3, chi1 yao4 le5 ma?",
          "translation_en": "You should rest more and drink hot water. Have you taken any medicine?",
          "translation_ko": "휴식을 많이 취하고 따뜻한 물을 마셔야 해요. 약은 먹었어요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "還沒有，我打算等一下去藥房買藥。",
          "pinyin": "Hái méiyǒu, wǒ dǎsuàn děng yíxià qù yàofáng mǎi yào.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hai2 mei2you3, wo3 da3suan4 deng3 yi2xia4 qu4 yao4fang2 mai3 yao4.",
          "translation_en": "Not yet. I plan to go to the pharmacy to buy medicine later.",
          "translation_ko": "아직요. 잠시 후에 약국에 가서 약을 살 생각이에요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "好，那你要好好休息，希望你快點好起來。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo, nà nǐ yào hǎohāo xiūxi, xīwàng nǐ kuài diǎn hǎo qǐlai.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3, na4 ni3 yao4 hao3hao1 xiu1xi, xi1wang4 ni3 kuai4 dian3 hao3 qi3lai5.",
          "translation_en": "Okay, then you should rest well. I hope you get better soon.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 푹 쉬세요. 빨리 나으시길 바랄게요."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What symptoms does B have?",
          "question_ko": "B는 어떤 증상이 있습니까?",
          "options_en": ["Sore throat, cough, runny nose", "Headache and fever", "Stomachache and diarrhea"],
          "options_ko": ["목 아픔, 기침, 콧물", "두통과 발열", "복통과 설사"],
          "correct_index": 0
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence, focusing on 'hóulóng tòng', 'késòu', and 'liú bíshuǐ'.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Describe your symptoms when you had a cold. What did you do to recover?"
    }
  ]
}
